items.name: A-Pose
items.description:
Pose up in the form of the letter A. I prefer this over the T-Pose.

Join my group for future clothes and emotes.

DESPITE THE PREVIEW IN BTROBLOX, IT DOES NOT DISPLAY AS SUCH IN GAMES. DO NOT BUY IT THINKING IT'LL WORK. IT IS THE REASON I RE-NAMED IT A-POSE.
